case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ISRAEL SANCHEZ ALVAREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ISRAEL SANCHEZ ALVAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, ISRAEL SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
